name: Impossible Mexican Fiesta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 or 3 ripe tomatoes or to taste. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cook and stir the meat in a large skillet until browned. Drain excess fat.
3. Season the meat with salt and pepper, then set aside.
4. Mix the cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise (or salad dressing), and onion.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the baking mix and water until a soft dough forms.
6. With floured fingers, pat the dough into a greased baking pan (13 X 9 X 2 inches).
7. Press the dough about 1/2 inch up the sides of the pan.
8. Layer the meat, tomato slices, and green pepper on top of the dough.
9. Spoon the sour cream mixture over the top and sprinkle with paprika, if used.
10. Bake uncovered for 25 to 30 minutes or until the edges of the dough are light brown.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes, then cut into squares.
